message:
🐛 fix: Remove branch_protection_rule trigger from scorecard workflow

The Prow branchprotector runs every 6 hours and updates branch protection
rules for multiple branches across all repos. Each update triggers the
branch_protection_rule event, causing the OpenSSF Scorecard workflow to
run dozens of times unnecessarily.

The scorecard only needs to run:
- Weekly (schedule)
- On merges to main (push)
- Manually (workflow_dispatch)

This change will be synced to all kubestellar repos via sync-workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,6 @@
 name: OpenSSF Scorecard
 
 on:
-  branch_protection_rule:
   schedule:
     - cron: '0 6 * * 1'
   push:
